title: I Remember Everything
why_this_song: I Remember Everything by Zach Bryan (2023) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Of a grown man's mouth when his mind's broke
You only smile like that when you're drinking
Rotgut whiskey's gonna ease my mind
Beach towel rests on the dryin' line
Do I remind you of your daddy in his '88 Ford?
Labrador hangin' out the passenger door

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remember" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remember" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Beach towel rests on the dryin' line
A cold shoulder at closing time

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Remember Everything", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Remember Everything", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "I Remember Everything" was released in 2023. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I Remember Everything" foi lançada em 2023. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Zach Bryan one question about "I Remember Everything", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Zach Bryan sobre "I Remember Everything", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "I Remember Everything" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "I Remember Everything" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "I Remember Everything" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "I Remember Everything" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
